title: Force Nametag Hidden
description: Forces the nametagvisibility from teams to always be set to never.
body:
Force Nametag Hidden
A lightweight Fabric mod that automatically sets all scoreboard teams to nametagVisibility = NEVER — including teams created during gameplay.

Why this mod exists
Many servers, minigames, and PvP environments want to hide player nametags for fairness, immersion, or competitive reasons.
Minecraft provides a built‑in team rule for this, but managing it manually is tedious and error‑prone.

This mod handles everything automatically, with zero commands or admin work.

Features:

⦁ Automatically sets all existing teams to NEVER

⦁ Detects newly created teams every tick and updates them instantly

⦁ Fully server‑side

⦁ Extremely lightweight and safe for any server size
